text:
N = SNF Stay (3rd digit of Provider ID = 5, 6, U, W, Y, or Z) 
S = Short-Stay (3rd digit of Provider ID = 0, M, R, S, T) 
L = Long-Stay (All Others) 

COMMENT: This field is derived from the third position of the provider number that is present on the first claim 
record included in the stay.
